log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:9+3=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 54/59

→ Javelin: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration HP: 55/67
